center.name: 卡伊群島
center.summary: 卡伊群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括Rufous-sided gerygone、帝汶鹃鵙、Australasian figbird等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Australasian figbird (Sphecotheres vieilloti), also known as the green figbird (not to be confused with the Timor figbird), is a conspicuous, medium-sized passerine bird native to a wide range of wooded habitats in northern and eastern Australia, southern New Guinea, and the Kai Islands.Higgins, P

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the Kai Islands in Indonesia

birds.evidence: It is native to the Kai Islands in Indonesia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the eastern Lesser Sunda Islands and Kai Islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The south Moluccan sunbird is endemic to Buru, Seram Island and the Kai Islands in the Maluku Islands of Indonesia. It is found in various habitats including mangroves, forest edge, open scrub as well as parks and gardens

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Lesser Sunda Islands and the Kai Islands
